componentVariants.name: button.primary
componentVariants.definition: Primary conversion or completion action in the current context.

componentVariants.name: button.secondary
componentVariants.definition: Secondary action placed near, but lower in priority than, the primary action.

componentVariants.name: button.ghost
componentVariants.definition: Low-emphasis utility or navigation action.

componentVariants.name: button.destructive
componentVariants.definition: Action that deletes, cancels, or permanently changes user data.

componentVariants.name: card.feature
componentVariants.definition: Card explaining one benefit, capability, or reason to believe.

componentVariants.name: card.service
componentVariants.definition: Card presenting a service overview and path to learn or book.

componentVariants.name: card.product
componentVariants.definition: Card showing a product preview and path to details or purchase.

componentVariants.name: card.testimonial
componentVariants.definition: Card carrying social proof, quote, or attribution.

componentVariants.name: input.text
componentVariants.definition: Single-line text input with label, helper, and error anatomy.

componentVariants.name: input.search
componentVariants.definition: Search input with query entry, optional clear control, and result feedback.

componentVariants.name: table.data
componentVariants.definition: Structured data table with caption, columns, rows, and optional controls.

componentVariants.name: dialog.confirmation
componentVariants.definition: Dialog asking the user to confirm or cancel a focused decision.

componentVariants.name: navigation.global
componentVariants.definition: Primary site or product navigation landmark.

componentVariants.name: productGrid.browse
componentVariants.definition: Product listing grid for browsing, filtering, sorting, and selection.

componentVariants.name: form.multiStep
componentVariants.definition: Form flow split into multiple steps with validation and recovery.

componentVariants.name: tabs.standard
componentVariants.definition: Mutually exclusive tab panels controlled by a tab list.

componentVariants.name: accordion.faq
componentVariants.definition: Disclosure list for frequently asked questions or supporting details.

componentVariants.name: alert.error
componentVariants.definition: Inline or page-level alert for blocking or recoverable errors.

componentVariants.name: toast.success
componentVariants.definition: Transient success message after a completed action.

componentVariants.name: emptyState.noResults
componentVariants.definition: Empty state for searches or filtered lists with no matching results.

componentVariants.name: header.global
componentVariants.definition: Primary site or product header.

componentVariants.name: footer.global
componentVariants.definition: Primary footer with recovery navigation, contact, and legal links.
